name: PER_DISPLAY_PHONES_V
query: SELECT PER_PHONES.PHONE_ID, PER_PHONES.DATE_FROM, PER_PHONES.DATE_TO, PER_PHONES.PHONE_TYPE, PER_PHONES.PHONE_NUMBER, PER_PHONES.SPEED_DIAL_NUMBER, PER_PHONES.AREA_CODE, PER_PHONES.SEARCH_PHONE_NUMBER, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE1, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE2, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE3, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE4, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE5, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE6, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE7, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE8, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE9, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE10, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE11, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE12, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE13, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE14, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE15, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE16, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE17, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE18, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE19, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE20, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE21, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE22, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE23, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE24, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE25, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE26, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE27, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE28, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE29, PER_PHONES.ATTRIBUTE30, PER_PHONES.CREATED_BY, PER_PHONES.CREATION_DATE, PER_PHONES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, PER_PHONES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PER_PHONES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PER_PHONES.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PER_PHONES.VALIDITY, PER_PHONES.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, PER_PHONES.COUNTRY_CODE_NUMBER, PER_PHONES.EXTENSION, PER_PHONES.PERSON_ID, PER_PHONE_FORMAT_PKG.GET_DISPLAY_PHONE(PHONE_ID, 'phones', null) DISPLAY_PHONE_NUMBER, PER_PHONES.LEGISLATION_CODE FROM PER_PHONES
